questionHtml: Suggest why ICP-OES does not give good quantitative results for distinguishing 6Li from naturally occurring lithium.
markschemeHtml:
emission spectra of both «6Li and natural Li» give same colour/produce same «range of» wavelengths
OR
they have same electron transitions/same nuclear charge  [✔]

 

Note: Accept “the spectra are almost identical”.

meta.title: Suggest why ICP-OES does not give good quantitative results for distinguishing 6Li from naturally occurring lithium.
breadcrumbLabels: A.2 Metals and inductively coupled plasma (ICP) spectroscopy
